nasb.text: “This is the portion of a wicked man from God, And the inheritance which tyrants receive from the Almighty.

esv.text: “This is the portion of a wicked man with God, and the heritage that oppressors receive from the Almighty:

cnv.text: 這是惡人從　神所得的分， 強暴的人從全能者所得的業。

ccb.text: “以下是上帝给恶人定的结局， 全能者赐给残暴之徒的归宿。
